item.title: Clint Hill Reflects on JFK Moments
item.description: A firsthand reflection on the final moments surrounding a major historical event. Personal insight into duty, reaction, and the lasting emotional impact.

media:content.media:title: Clint Hill Reflects on JFK Moments
media:content.media:description: A firsthand reflection on the final moments surrounding a major historical event. Personal insight into duty, reaction, and the lasting emotional impact.

item.title: Veterans Reflect on Concentration Camps
item.description: A firsthand account from veterans describing the liberation and conditions of concentration camps, sharing historical perspective and lasting impact of what they witnessed.

media:content.media:title: Veterans Reflect on Concentration Camps
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account from veterans describing the liberation and conditions of concentration camps, sharing historical perspective and lasting impact of what they witnessed.

item.title: A Soldier’s Life on Horseback
item.description: A look at daily life for a soldier who relied on horses for travel and duty. Covering training, movement, and the challenges of mounted service in the field.

media:content.media:title: A Soldier’s Life on Horseback
media:content.media:description: A look at daily life for a soldier who relied on horses for travel and duty. Covering training, movement, and the challenges of mounted service in the field.

item.title: WWII Veteran Ray Lambert on D-Day
item.description: A firsthand account of D-Day service from WWII veteran Ray Lambert. Sharing memories of combat, landing operations, and experiences during the Normandy invasion.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Ray Lambert on D-Day
media:content.media:description: A firsthand account of D-Day service from WWII veteran Ray Lambert. Sharing memories of combat, landing operations, and experiences during the Normandy invasion.

item.title: A Veteran’s Life-Saving Maneuver
item.description: A powerful account of a critical maneuver that helped save lives during service. Sharing real experiences, quick decision-making, and moments under pressure.

media:content.media:title: A Veteran’s Life-Saving Maneuver
media:content.media:description: A powerful account of a critical maneuver that helped save lives during service. Sharing real experiences, quick decision-making, and moments under pressure.

item.title: Vietnam War Stories from Veterans
item.description: Veterans share personal accounts of the Vietnam War. Reflecting on combat experiences, challenges, and the lasting human cost of service during the conflict.

media:content.media:title: Vietnam War Stories from Veterans
media:content.media:description: Veterans share personal accounts of the Vietnam War. Reflecting on combat experiences, challenges, and the lasting human cost of service during the conflict.

item.title: Jackie Kennedy After JFK Shooting
item.description: A look at Jackie Kennedy’s words and actions following the shooting of JFK. Covering her immediate response, emotions, and historical impact during a national tragedy.

media:content.media:title: Jackie Kennedy After JFK Shooting
media:content.media:description: A look at Jackie Kennedy’s words and actions following the shooting of JFK. Covering her immediate response, emotions, and historical impact during a national tragedy.

item.title: H.R. McMaster in Operation Desert Storm
item.description: A look at H.R. McMaster’s military service during Operation Desert Storm. Covering his role, leadership experience, and involvement in the Gulf War conflict.

media:content.media:title: H.R. McMaster in Operation Desert Storm
media:content.media:description: A look at H.R. McMaster’s military service during Operation Desert Storm. Covering his role, leadership experience, and involvement in the Gulf War conflict.

item.title: WWII Paratrooper on the Great Depression
item.description: A WWII paratrooper reflects on growing up during the Great Depression. Sharing memories of hardship, resilience, and how early life shaped wartime service.

media:content.media:title: WWII Paratrooper on the Great Depression
media:content.media:description: A WWII paratrooper reflects on growing up during the Great Depression. Sharing memories of hardship, resilience, and how early life shaped wartime service.

item.title: Untold Stories from Two Veterans
item.description: Two veterans share lesser-known personal accounts from their service. Reflecting on experiences, challenges, and moments that were rarely spoken about after returning home.

media:content.media:title: Untold Stories from Two Veterans
media:content.media:description: Two veterans share lesser-known personal accounts from their service. Reflecting on experiences, challenges, and moments that were rarely spoken about after returning home.

item.title: Meeting a General on Omaha Beach
item.description: A personal wartime story about unexpectedly encountering a general during the Omaha Beach operation. A reflection on intense moments, leadership, and battlefield chaos.

media:content.media:title: Meeting a General on Omaha Beach
media:content.media:description: A personal wartime story about unexpectedly encountering a general during the Omaha Beach operation. A reflection on intense moments, leadership, and battlefield chaos.
